draftIntent.intent: Add an automated repository-doctor workflow that checks branch posture, repository layout, workflow health, data-repository boundaries, and records deterministic evidence without touching parked or archived repositories.
comments: Draft this interactively and keep publication behind explicit human confirmation.
The issue must include objective acceptance checks and a safe rollout sequence.

policy.branching: One worker = one issue = one branch = one PR; branch df/<issue>-<slug> from dev.
policy.enforcement: All merges require green CI and the configured review gate; never force-push or bypass gates.

facts: The PRD is the source of truth for the backlog.
